name: @vectojs/devtools
description: In-page Virtual Math Tree inspector for VectoJS scenes — entity picking, live tree view, and state readout, itself rendered with VectoJS

scripts.build: (cd ../core && bun run build) && (cd ../ui && bun run build) && tsup src/index.ts --format cjs,esm --clean && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
